title: rubus × aequabilis
intro: Rubus × aequabilis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or thimbleberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × aequabilis include its potential to reduce cancer risk, alleviate cardiovascular disease, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × aequabilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
